business.name: Davis and Tice Plumbing Company
business.tagline: Reliable plumbing solutions for Middle Georgia homes

hero.headline: Macon's *Most Trusted* Plumbing Experts Since Day One
hero.subheadline: From emergency repairs to complete installations, we deliver professional plumbing services that keep your home running smoothly.

services_section.label: OUR EXPERTISE
services_section.heading: Complete Plumbing Solutions
services_section.subheading: Professional service for every plumbing challenge in your home

services.title: Emergency Plumbing Repairs
services.description: Burst pipes, major leaks, and urgent plumbing issues fixed fast. We respond quickly to minimize damage and restore your plumbing system.

services.title: Water Heater Installation & Repair
services.description: Expert installation of tankless and traditional water heaters. We service all major brands and help you choose the right system for your home.

services.title: Drain Cleaning & Sewer Lines
services.description: Professional drain clearing using advanced equipment. We handle everything from kitchen sinks to main sewer line blockages and repairs.

services.title: Bathroom & Kitchen Plumbing
services.description: Complete fixture installation and renovation plumbing. We handle sink replacements, toilet installation, and full bathroom remodeling projects.

services.title: Leak Detection & Pipe Repair
services.description: Advanced leak detection technology to find hidden problems. We repair and replace pipes with minimal disruption to your property.

about.heading: Serving Middle Georgia with Pride
about.body: Davis and Tice Plumbing Company has been the backbone of reliable plumbing service in Macon and surrounding communities. Our experienced team combines old-school craftsmanship with modern techniques to solve any plumbing challenge. We treat every home like our own and stand behind our work with solid guarantees.

reviews.name: Jennifer M.
reviews.text: Called Davis and Tice when our water heater died on a Sunday morning. They had someone here within 2 hours and installed a new unit the same day. Professional crew and fair pricing.

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: These guys saved our kitchen renovation timeline when we discovered old pipes that needed replacing. They worked around our contractor's schedule and finished everything perfectly.

reviews.name: Maria L.
reviews.text: Had a persistent drain issue that two other plumbers couldn't solve. Davis and Tice found the real problem in our main line and fixed it right the first time. Highly recommend.

service_areas.label: SERVICE COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: We Serve All of Middle Georgia
service_areas.subheading: Professional plumbing service throughout the region

cta.heading: Ready to Fix Your Plumbing Problems?
cta.body: Don't let plumbing issues disrupt your daily routine. Our experienced team is ready to provide fast, professional service that gets your home back to normal.
